texto: So you raise up a few generations of young girls, telling them that they should step to the back of the bus, ingrain that in their psyche, preach it to them from the pulpit, hold up as ideal examples women doing precisely that, and in a few years, you can step back; you need say no more. Your work is done, because you have carefully created a herd of women who know and even begrudgingly accept that their place is secondary, just outside the limelight, clapping for and cheering on the important people who were never taught to put others first.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Susan Campbell sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “So you raise up a few generations of young girls, telling them that they should step to the back …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a saude-mental, feminism, fundamentalism, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e trabalho.

Your work is done, because you have carefully created a herd of women who know and even begrudgingly accept that their place is secondary, just outside the limelight, clapping for and cheering on the important people who were never taught to put others first.
